description_long: This is an upright piano with an ornate, classical design, featuring a predominantly white painted wooden exterior that shows signs of age and wear, including chipped paint and exposed wood. The front panel is decorated with delicate floral engravings and a central medallion, while the legs and base are elaborately carved. The top surface is slightly warped and stained, indicating prolonged exposure to the elements or heavy use. The back of the piano reveals the internal wooden bracing and structure, with a dark, unfinished wood frame and visible cross-bracing. The keyboard is partially visible, with some discoloration and wear, and a single brass pedal is mounted at the base.
description: A weathered, ornate upright piano with a white painted exterior, floral engravings, and visible signs of age and wear. The back exposes the internal wooden structure and bracing.
description_view_0: Side view showing the ornate carved leg, white painted panel with chipped areas, and the warped top surface.
description_view_1: Rear view revealing the dark wooden frame, internal bracing, and exposed wood grain, contrasting with the painted exterior.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the plain white panel, carved leg, and the overall depth of the piano.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the decorative floral engravings, worn keyboard area, and a single visible brass pedal at the base.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Standard upright piano keyboard with alternating white and black keys; some keys appear worn but the arrangement is typical.
